name: fleet-mesh
description: Check personal fleet ssh/et reachability over Tailscale, then flag duplicate private keys, dead etserver, stale IPs, and missing Host entries.

interface.shortDescription: Check personal fleet ssh/et reachability over Tailscale, then flag duplicate private keys, dead etserver, stale IPs, and missing Host entries.
interface.longDescription: Check personal fleet ssh/et reachability over Tailscale, then flag duplicate private keys, dead etserver, stale IPs, and missing Host entries. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Run the fleet-mesh check from this host and report the reachability matrix and any hygiene findings. If a link is down or a key/config problem is found, diagnose it and propose the fix before changing anything.
